specific_location: Dr. Funk's house. Address unknown. East edge of Paonia.
description: Head: all black with a large pale bill. back: all black except for a white rump patch. Tail: black. Rose bib on a white belly. Black wings with white wing bars.Behaviors: This bird was seen at a feeder at the east edge of Paonia, CO. Other seed-eating species were feeding with it.Call: not heardPlumage: alternate
